mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_sn, o.coupon_id, o.integration, o.member_id, ot.id ot_id, ot.product_id ot_product_id, ot.product_name ot_product_name, ot.product_sku_id ot_product_sku_id, ot.product_sku_code ot_product_sku_code, ot.product_quantity ot_product_quantity, ot.flash_promotion_relation_id ot_flash_promotion_relation_id FROM oms_order o LEFT JOIN oms_order_item ot ON o.id = ot.order_id WHERE o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.id, o.order_sn, o.coupon_id, o.integration, o.member_id, o.use_integration, ot.id ot_id, ot.product_id ot_product_id, ot.product_name ot_product_name, ot.product_sku_id ot_product_sku_id, ot.product_sku_code ot_product_sku_code, ot.product_quantity ot_product_quantity, ot.flash_promotion_relation_id ot_flash_promotion_relation_id FROM oms_order o LEFT JOIN oms_order_item ot ON o.id = ot.order_id WHERE o.status = 0 AND o.create_time < date_add(NOW(), INTERVAL -#{minute} MINUTE);

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(ot.product_quantity), 0) FROM oms_order o LEFT JOIN oms_order_item ot ON o.id = ot.order_id WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} AND ot.flash_promotion_relation_id = #{relationId} AND o.status IN (1,2,3) AND DATE(o.create_time) = CURDATE()
